summary: Growth Intelligence Dashboard - Iteration 302. Backend: 36/36 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 17/17 data-testid elements verified. All features working: Viral K tracking, Funnel visualization, Growth Alerts, Period selector, Daily trends, Top performing content, Conversion rates grid.

issues: R2 storage images blocked by CORS policy - known infrastructure issue from iteration 301

Invalid event type correctly returns 400 error
Funnel BIGGEST DROP detection working - highlights weakest stage in red
Growth Alerts auto-diagnosis provides actionable suggestions
Viral K calculation using (avg_shares_per_user * conversion_rate_per_share) formula
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test events via /api/growth/event and /api/growth/events/batch for pytest validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Intelligence Dashboard at /app/admin/growth fully tested. Backend APIs: /api/growth/metrics, /api/growth/funnel, /api/growth/viral-coefficient, /api/growth/trends, /api/growth/event, /api/growth/events/batch all working. Dashboard shows: Viral K=0.273 (WEAK), 11 page views, 7 remixes, 3 signups, 2 creations. BIGGEST DROP at Tool Opens (42.9%). 6 conversion rate cards with color coding. Period selector (7d/14d/30d) and refresh button functional.

growth_alerts.auto_diagnosis: Users click Remix but tool doesn't open prefilled. Check: localStorage flow, remix_data TTL, navigation routing.
